scripts.dev: echo "Use bun run dev:admin | bun run dev:portal | bun run dev:api"
scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: bun --cwd packages/shared build && bun --cwd packages/config build && bun --cwd packages/db build && bun --cwd packages/ui build
scripts.build:apps: bun --cwd apps/admin-web build && bun --cwd apps/key-portal build && bun --cwd apps/api-worker build
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:packages && bun run typecheck:apps
scripts.typecheck:packages: bun --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun --cwd packages/config typecheck && bun --cwd packages/db typecheck && bun --cwd packages/ui typecheck
scripts.typecheck:apps: bun --cwd apps/admin-web typecheck && bun --cwd apps/key-portal typecheck && bun --cwd apps/api-worker typecheck
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.db:migrate:local: bun x wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --cwd apps/api-worker
scripts.test:integration:ci: bun run test:integration:openai && bun run test:integration:anthropic && bun run test:integration:gemini
scripts.test:integration:anthropic: bun run test:integration:anthropic:nonstream && bun run test:integration:anthropic:stream-text && bun run test:integration:anthropic:tool-use-stream && bun run test:integration:anthropic:tool-choice-auto-any && bun run test:integration:anthropic:tool-use-multi-nonstream && bun run test:integration:anthropic:tool-use-multi-stream && bun run test:integration:anthropic:tool-use-nonstream && bun run test:integration:anthropic:invalid-request && bun run test:integration:anthropic:gateway-failover && bun run test:integration:anthropic:tools-request
